name: Boo
description:
My first bot, he’s a clown and a freak. He’s very gentle tho, so be kind to him. Anyways if it glitches it’s not my fault! It’s sometimes to bot’s fault or just Janitor sometimes, please review it and tell me anything if it needs fixing!

_______________________________

Have fun with scary boy!

Yes it will have an image soon, I need to draw it, sometimes will use ai, but haven’t found any motivation to draw him yet, so using Pinterest.

But for now it’s Pinterest images so give credits!!! Because I just found a random picture of a clown.
